svg.title: Synalux POS — advantage
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for advantage. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: Referral tracking | partner benefits | commission tiers | dual pricing (cash discount) | pos_config
Legal Framing — Cash Discount vs. Surcharge
This program is a CASH DISCOUNT — the base price shown is the card price. Cash customers get a discount applied at checkout.
A surcharge (adding a fee to cash-price base) is illegal in CT, MA and must not be used. This implementation complies with card network rules.
Dual pricing signage is required at entrance and register — see Print Compliance Sign button below.
Applied as a percentage discount to cash-paying customers. Typical range: 3.5% - 4.0%
Shown on receipt, register display, and online checkout. Must say "Cash Discount" or equivalent.
Common: "Cash Discount" | "Cash Price" | "Card Price Adjustment" | Custom
card tenders always pay card price
Receipt shows cash discount line item
Online menu shows card and cash prices
All compliance flags stored in pos_config.advantage_compliance jsonb
Track restaurant referrals to the Synalux Advantage program
Earn higher commissions as you refer more restaurants
Benefits available to active Advantage Program members
+ Free POS software license for first 6 months
What the cashier sees when Advantage Program is active
Show dual pricing on online menu
Displays "Card: $X.XX | Cash: $Y.YY" on each menu item
Synalux POS | Advantage Program | pos_config.advantage_* | pos_advantage_referrals — no hardcodes, all DB-driven
